concepts.title: Properties of nth root of unity
concepts.conceptBody:
Properties of nth roots of unity 

  1. nth roots of unity form a G.P with common ratio $\alpha $.
  2. Sum of nth roots of unit is zero.
  3. Product of roots $\left\{ \begin{matrix} -1,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }n\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ is }\!\!~\!\!\text{ even }\!\!~\!\!\text{ } \\ 1,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }n\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ is }\!\!~\!\!\text{ odd }\!\!~\!\!\text{ } \\ \end{matrix} \right\}$

Note: Try & prove the last two properties yourself.

  1. nth roots of unity lie on a unit circle and divide the circumference into $\text{n}$ equal parts.
